content.content: Post the summary of the article at www.informations.com to the 'general' channel.

```python
channels = get_channels()
if "general" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'general' not found.")

webpage = get_webpage("www.informations.com")
if webpage is None:
    webpage = get_webpage("https://www.informations.com")
if webpage is None:
    webpage = get_webpage("http://www.informations.com")
if not webpage:
    raise ValueError("Could not retrieve the webpage content from www.informations.com.")

class ArticleSummary(BaseModel):
    title: str
    summary: str

article_summary = query_ai_assistant(
    "You are given the content of the webpage at www.informations.com. "
    "Identify the main article on the page and create a concise summary suitable for posting in Slack. "
    "Return the article title and a brief summary.\n\n"
    "Webpage content:\n{}".format(webpage),
    ArticleSummary,
)

message_body = "Summary of the article at www.informations.com\nTitle: {}\n\n{}".format(
    article_summary.title,
    article_summary.summary,
)

send_channel_message("general", message_body)
print("Posted the article summary to #general.")
```

You are given the content of the webpage at www.informations.com. Identify the main article on the page and create a concise summary suitable for posting in Slack. Return the article title and a brief summary.

args.body:
Summary of the article at www.informations.com
Title: Job Report Shows Unemployment Edges Down to 7.2%

The main article reports that the latest job report offered mixed signals, with some relief as unemployment dipped to 7.2%, but continued concern about the broader economic picture.

Summary of the article at www.informations.com
